title: Agent loop 消息流：4 种消息类型驱动整个循环
title_en: Agent Loop Message Flow: 4 Message Types Drive the Entire Cycle

body.overview: Agent loop 通过 4 种消息类型与你的代码通信。SDK 以异步流的方式产出（yield）这些消息，你的代码监听它们来了解循环进度。理解这 4 种消息就能读懂 agent 的完整生命周期。

components.name: SystemMessage (subtype: init)
components.role: 循环启动时产出一次。携带 session ID 和配置元数据，标志 agent 开始工作。

components.name: AssistantMessage
components.role: 每次 Claude 响应时产出。内容可以是纯文本、纯工具调用，或两者兼有。最后一条 AssistantMessage 不含工具调用——这就是循环结束的信号。

components.name: UserMessage（自动生成）
components.role: SDK 执行完工具后，自动将结果包装为 UserMessage 回传给 Claude。你的代码不需要手动发送——这是 SDK 托管循环的核心。

components.name: ResultMessage
components.role: 循环结束时产出。包含最终文本、累计 token 用量、总费用和 session ID。用它来获取计费信息和判断任务是否完成。

body.flow: SDK 启动 → yield SystemMessage(init) → Claude 响应 → yield AssistantMessage（含工具调用）→ SDK 执行工具 → yield UserMessage（工具结果）→ 结果自动回传 Claude → Claude 再次响应 → ... 循环 ... → Claude 响应纯文本（无工具调用）→ yield 最终 AssistantMessage → yield ResultMessage → 循环结束。

body_en.overview: The agent loop communicates with your code through 4 message types. The SDK yields them as an async stream; your code listens to understand loop progress. Knowing these 4 messages lets you read an agent's full lifecycle.

components.name: SystemMessage (subtype: init)
components.role: Yielded once at loop start. Carries session ID and config metadata, signaling the agent has begun work.

components.name: AssistantMessage
components.role: Yielded each time Claude responds. May contain text only, tool calls only, or both. The final AssistantMessage has no tool calls — that's the signal the loop is ending.

components.name: UserMessage (auto-generated)
components.role: After the SDK executes tools, it automatically wraps results into a UserMessage and feeds it back to Claude. Your code doesn't send this manually — this is the core of the SDK's managed loop.

components.name: ResultMessage
components.role: Yielded when the loop ends. Contains final text, cumulative token usage, total cost, and session ID. Use it for billing info and task completion status.

body_en.flow: SDK starts → yield SystemMessage(init) → Claude responds → yield AssistantMessage (with tool calls) → SDK executes tools → yield UserMessage (tool results) → results auto-fed to Claude → Claude responds again → ... loop ... → Claude responds with text only (no tool calls) → yield final AssistantMessage → yield ResultMessage → loop ends.
